justification: The diff correctly migrates JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) across all test files, replacing deprecated annotations (@Before/@After -> @BeforeEach/@AfterEach) and expected-exception patterns with assertThrows. It also adopts Java 14+ pattern matching for instanceof and String.formatted() in Turismo.java, and adds @Serial annotations for serialVersionUID fields. The pom.xml and CI workflows are updated to target Java 21. The only minor issue is the inconsistent import style in MapResolverTest.java (mixing static wildcard and explicit Assertions import), but this doesn't affect correctness.
